heading: Counterclaim for an order other than a sum of money
infoParagraph1: You will be able to upload any evidence you have on the next page.
infoParagraph2: The claimant will be able to see your answers.
characterCountHint: For example, 'for the landlord to conduct remedial works'
orderOtherThanSumRequestedLabel: What orders are you asking the court to make?
orderOtherThanSumFactsLabel: What facts would you like the court to consider when deciding the claim?

orderOtherThanSumRequested.required: Enter what orders you are asking the court to make

orderOtherThanSumFacts.required: Enter what facts you would like the court to consider when deciding the claim
